ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "input" TEXT /* Input used to analyze the website (e.g., URL, domain, IP address) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the website */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code returned by the website */,
  "content_length" INTEGER /* Length of the content returned by the website */,
  "csp_domains" TEXT /* Content Security Policy (CSP) domains */,
  "tls_host" TEXT /* TLS host */,
  "tls_port" INTEGER /* TLS port */,
  "tls_probe_status" INTEGER /* Status of the TLS probe */,
  "tls_tls_version" TEXT /* TLS version */,
  "tls_cipher" TEXT /* TLS cipher */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the website was first scanned */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the website was last scanned */,
  "scan_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the website is scanned (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS certificate */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the certificate belongs to */,
  "tls_not_before" TEXT /* Date the certificate is valid from */,
  "tls_not_after" TEXT /* Date the certificate is valid to */,
  "tls_subject_dn" TEXT /* Subject Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate */,
  "tls_subject_cn" TEXT /* Subject Common Name (CN) of the certificate */,
  "tls_subject_an" TEXT /* Subject Alternative Name (SAN) of the certificate */,
  "tls_issuer_dn" TEXT /* Issuer Distinguished Name (DN) of the certificate */,
  "tls_issuer_cn" TEXT /* Issuer Common Name (CN) of the certificate */,
  "tls_issuer_org" TEXT /* Issuer Organization of the certificate */,
  "tls_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the certificate */,
  "tls_fingerprint" TEXT /* Fingerprint of the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_certificates_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the technology belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the technology */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the technology (e.g., programming language, framework, library) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_servers" (
  "web_server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web server */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the web server belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the web server */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the web server */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system the web server is running on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("web_server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_servers_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the content type belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of content (e.g., text/html, image/jpeg, video/mp4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_types_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HTTP method */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the HTTP method belongs to */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method (e.g., GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HTTP method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the host belongs to */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hosts_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favicons" (
  "favicon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favicon */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the favicon belongs to */,
  "favicon" INTEGER /* Favicon */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of favicon (e.g., ico, png, svg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favicon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favicons_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "a_tags" (
  "a_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 'a' tag */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the 'a' tag belongs to */,
  "a_tag" TEXT /* 'a' tag */,
  "href" TEXT /* Href attribute of the 'a' tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("a_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_a_tags_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tech_tags" (
  "tech_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology tag */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the technology tag belongs to */,
  "tech_tag" TEXT /* Technology tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the technology tag (e.g., programming language, framework, library) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tech_tags_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the report belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technology stack, SSL/TLS configuration, content security policy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)
